title: Tulla Gladeyes and the Shrieking Squeebees
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tulla Gladeyes and the Shrieking Squeebees''' were a band that frequently performed at [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] around the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne]]''
